glosses.ja: 信頼できる; 頼りになる

translations.es: La aplicación funciona de forma confiable.
translations.yue: 呢個應用程式運作好穩定。
translations.pt: O aplicativo funciona de forma confiável.
translations.vi: Ứng dụng hoạt động ổn định.
translations.hi: ऐप भरोसेमंद तरीके से काम करता है।
translations.ja: このアプリは安定して動作します。

tokens.explanation: Definite determiner introducing the subject noun phrase; feminine nominative singular agreeing with 'App'.
Common noun; head of the subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; heads the predicate.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb 'funktioniert'.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder ist zuverlässig und pünktlich.

translations.de: Mein Bruder ist zuverlässig und pünktlich.
translations.en: My brother is reliable and punctual.
translations.es: Mi hermano es de confianza y puntual.
translations.fr: Mon frère est fiable et ponctuel.
translations.it: Mio fratello è affidabile e puntuale.
translations.ko: 우리 형은 믿음직하고 시간을 잘 지켜요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥很靠谱而且很准时。
translations.pt: Meu irmão é confiável e pontual.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi đáng tin và đúng giờ.
translations.ar: أخي جدير بالثقة ودقيق في المواعيد.
translations.nl: Mijn broer is betrouwbaar en punctueel.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई भरोसेमंद और समय का पाबंद है।
translations.pl: Mój brat jest niezawodny i punktualny.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου είναι αξιόπιστος και συνεπής.
translations.nb: Broren min er pålitelig og punktlig.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya dapat diandalkan dan tepat waktu.
translations.sv: Min bror är pålitlig och punktlig.
translations.ro: Fratele meu este de încredere și punctual.
translations.cs: Můj bratr je spolehlivý a dochvilný.
translations.da: Min bror er pålidelig og punktlig.
translations.ja: 兄は信頼できて時間を守ります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Bruder'; nominative masculine singular.
Common noun; head of the subject in nominative singular.
Copular auxiliary (present, 3rd singular) linking the subject to the predicate adjectives.
Predicative adjective complement of the copula; first conjunct.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicative adjectives.
Predicative adjective coordinated with 'zuverlässig'.

translations.en: The bus shows up reliably in the morning.
translations.es: El autobús llega puntual por la mañana.
translations.fr: Le bus arrive à l'heure le matin.
translations.pt: O ônibus chega pontualmente de manhã.
translations.vi: Buổi sáng xe buýt đến đúng giờ.
translations.ar: الحافلة تصل صباحًا في الوقت المحدد.
translations.nl: De bus komt ’s ochtends op tijd.
translations.hi: सुबह बस समय पर आती है।
translations.el: Το λεωφορείο έρχεται το πρωί στην ώρα του.
translations.nb: Bussen kommer i tide om morgenen.
translations.id: Bus datang tepat waktu pada pagi hari.
translations.sv: Bussen kommer i tid på morgonen.
translations.da: Bussen kommer til tiden om morgenen.
translations.ja: 朝はバスが時間どおりに来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite determiner introducing the subject noun phrase; masculine nominative singular agreeing with 'Bus'.
Common noun; head of the subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; heads the predicate.
Temporal adverb specifying habitual time.
Adverb of manner modifying 'kommt'.

sentences.target: Unsere Nachbarin hilft zuverlässig bei Notfällen.

translations.de: Unsere Nachbarin hilft zuverlässig bei Notfällen.
translations.en: Our neighbor helps reliably in emergencies.
translations.es: Nuestra vecina siempre ayuda en emergencias.
translations.fr: Notre voisine aide toujours en cas d'urgence.
translations.it: La nostra vicina aiuta sempre in caso di emergenza.
translations.ko: 우리 이웃은 응급 상황에 늘 도와줘요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的邻居在紧急情况时总是帮忙。
translations.yue: 有緊急情況時我哋個鄰居都會幫手。
translations.ru: Наша соседка всегда помогает в экстренных случаях.
translations.pt: Nossa vizinha sempre ajuda em emergências.
translations.he: השכנה שלנו תמיד עוזרת במצבי חירום.
translations.tr: Komşumuz acil durumlarda her zaman yardımcı olur.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm của chúng tôi luôn giúp khi có trường hợp khẩn cấp.
translations.ar: جارتنا تساعد دائمًا في حالات الطوارئ.
translations.nl: Onze buurvrouw helpt altijd bij noodgevallen.
translations.uk: Наша сусідка завжди допомагає під час надзвичайних ситуацій.
translations.hi: हमारी पड़ोसन आपात स्थितियों में हमेशा मदद करती है।
translations.pl: Nasza sąsiadka zawsze pomaga w nagłych wypadkach.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσά μας βοηθά πάντα σε περιπτώσεις ανάγκης.
translations.nb: Naboen vår hjelper alltid i nødstilfeller.
translations.id: Tetangga kami selalu membantu saat darurat.
translations.sv: Vår granne hjälper alltid vid nödsituationer.
translations.ro: Vecina noastră ajută mereu în caz de urgență.
translations.cs: Naše sousedka vždy pomůže v nouzových situacích.
translations.da: Vores nabo hjælper altid i nødsituationer.
translations.ja: 近所の女性は緊急時にいつも助けてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Nachbarin'; feminine nominative singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun (feminine); head of the subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; takes a PP complement here.
Adverb of manner modifying 'hilft'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Common noun in dative plural; object of the preposition 'bei'.
